executives.name: Tim Cook
executives.background: Tim Cook is the CEO of Apple and serves on its board of directors. Before being named CEO in August 2011, Tim was Apple’s chief operating officer and was responsible for all of the company’s worldwide sales and operations, including end-to-end management of Apple’s supply chain, sales activities, and service and support in all markets and countries. He also headed Apple’s Macintosh division and played a key role in the continued development of strategic reseller and supplier relationships, ensuring flexibility in response to an increasingly demanding marketplace.

executives.name: Luca Maestri
executives.background: Luca Maestri is Apple’s senior vice president and Chief Financial Officer reporting to CEO Tim Cook. As CFO, Luca oversees the accounting, business support, financial planning and analysis, treasury, real estate, information systems, internal audit and tax functions at Apple. Luca joined Apple in 2013 as vice president of Finance and corporate controller, and has worked closely with Apple’s senior leadership since his arrival.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Jeff Williams
executives.background: Jeff Williams is Apple’s chief operating officer reporting to CEO Tim Cook. He oversees Apple’s entire worldwide operations, as well as customer service and support. He leads Apple’s renowned design team and the software and hardware engineering for Apple Watch. Jeff also drives the company’s health initiatives, pioneering new technologies and advancing medical research to help people better understand and manage their health and fitness.

executives.name: Katherine Adams
executives.background: Katherine Adams is Apple’s senior vice president and General Counsel, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. Kate serves on the company’s executive team and oversees all legal matters, including corporate governance, intellectual property, litigation and securities compliance, global security and privacy.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and General Counsel

executives.name: Eddy Cue
executives.background: Eddy Cue is Apple’s senior vice president of Services, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. Eddy oversees the full range of Apple’s services, including Apple Music, Apple TV+, Apple News, Apple Maps, Apple Pay, Apple Card, iCloud, and more.

executives.name: Craig Federighi
executives.background: Craig Federighi is Apple’s senior vice president of Software Engineering, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. Craig oversees the development of iOS, iPadOS, and macOS. His teams are responsible for delivering the software at the heart of Apple’s products, including the user interface, applications, and frameworks.

executives.name: John Giannandrea
executives.background: John Giannandrea is Apple’s senior vice president of Machine Learning and AI Strategy, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. John joined Apple in 2018 and oversees the strategy for Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning across the company and the development of Core ML and Siri technologies.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Machine Learning and AI Strategy

executives.name: Greg Joswiak
executives.background: Greg “Joz” Joswiak is Apple’s senior vice president of Worldwide Marketing, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. Since joining Apple in June 1986, Joz has played a pivotal role in the product marketing and management of all Apple products.

executives.name: Sabih Khan
executives.background: Sabih Khan is Apple’s senior vice president of Operations reporting to COO Jeff Williams. Sabih is responsible for Apple’s entire worldwide supply chain, ensuring product quality and overseeing planning, procurement, manufacturing, logistics and product fulfillment functions.

executives.name: Deirdre O’Brien
executives.background: Deirdre O’Brien is Apple’s senior vice president of Retail, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. Deirdre leads Apple’s retail and online stores, focusing on the connection between customers and the people and products they love.

executives.name: Johny Srouji
executives.background: Johny Srouji is Apple’s senior vice president of Hardware Technologies, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. Johny built one of the world’s strongest and most innovative teams of silicon and technology engineers, overseeing breakthrough custom silicon and hardware technologies.

executives.name: John Ternus
executives.background: John Ternus is Apple’s senior vice president of Hardware Engineering, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. John leads all hardware engineering, including the teams behind iPhone, iPad, Mac, AirPods, and more.

board_of_directors.name: Arthur Levinson
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Levinson has served as the CEO of Calico, a company focused on health, well-being, and longevity, since 2013. He previously served as CEO of Genentech, Inc. from 1995 to 2009 and as its Chairman from 1999 to 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Tim Cook
board_of_directors.background: Tim Cook is the CEO of Apple and serves on its board of directors. He joined Apple in 1998.

board_of_directors.name: Wanda Austin
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Austin is the former President and CEO of The Aerospace Corporation, a leading architect for the nation’s national security space programs. She served in this role from 2008 to 2016.

board_of_directors.name: Alex Gorsky
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gorsky is the former Chairman and CEO of Johnson & Johnson, where he served as Chairman and CEO from 2012 to 2021 and Executive Chairman in 2022.

board_of_directors.name: Andrea Jung
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Jung has served as the President and CEO of Grameen America, a non-profit microfinance organization, since 2014. She previously served as Chairman and CEO of Avon Products, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Monica Lozano
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Lozano is the former President and CEO of College Futures Foundation and former Chairman and CEO of ImpreMedia, LLC.

board_of_directors.name: Ronald Sugar
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Sugar is the former Chairman and CEO of Northrop Grumman Corporation, where he served from 2003 to 2010.

board_of_directors.name: Sue Wagner
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Wagner is a co-founder of BlackRock, Inc. and served as its Vice Chairman from 2006 to 2012.
